description_long: This is a classic wristwatch featuring a round, gold-toned metal case with a polished finish and a white dial. The dial is adorned with dark hour markers and hands, providing clear legibility, and includes additional subdials for extra functionality. The watch is paired with a black leather strap that has a subtle textured pattern, secured by a gold buckle clasp. The crown and pushers on the right side of the case suggest chronograph or multifunction capabilities. The overall design is elegant and suitable for both formal and casual urban settings. The materials and construction indicate durability and a premium aesthetic.
description: A gold-cased analog wristwatch with a white dial, black leather strap, and gold buckle, featuring subdials and chronograph pushers.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gold case, white dial, and black leather strap with a gold buckle; crown and pushers are visible.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the width of the strap and the round gold case; dial details are partially visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the gold buckle and strap curvature more prominent; crown and pushers less visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the strap's width and texture, with the gold case and pushers visible from the side.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is white with dark hour markers and hands, featuring multiple subdials arranged symmetrically, likely for chronograph or multifunction use. The markers are simple indices, and the overall style is classic with a touch of complexity due to the subdials.
attribute_strap_type: Black leather strap with a textured pattern and stitched edges.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with central hour, minute, and second hands, plus additional subdials for chronograph or multifunction features.
